ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the campaign */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "blurb" TEXT /* Brief description of the campaign */,
  "goal" REAL /* Funding goal for the campaign */,
  "pledged" REAL /* Total amount pledged to the campaign */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the campaign */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the campaign (e.g., theater, music, art) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date when the campaign was updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the project (e.g., city, country) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image representing the campaign */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of a video promoting the campaign */,
  "rewards" TEXT /* Description of the rewards offered to backers for different pledge levels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the artist */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the artist */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the artist within the platform (e.g., creator, administrator) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the artist's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the artist account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date when the artist account was updated */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the artist's personal or professional website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* URLs of the artist's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the backer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the backer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the backer within the platform (e.g., supporter, donor) */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the backer */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the backer's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the backer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date when the backer account was updated */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the backer's personal or professional website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* URLs of the backer's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pledges" (
  "pledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pledge */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being pledged to */,
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backer making the pledge */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the pledge */,
  "pledge_date" TEXT /* Date the pledge was made */,
  "reward_level" TEXT /* Reward level chosen by the backer */,
  "fulfilled" INTEGER /* Whether the reward has been fulfilled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the pledge was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date when the pledge was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_backer_id FOREIGN KEY ("backer_id") REFERENCES backers ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pledges_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being updated */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was posted */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of an image associated with the update */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of a video associated with the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the update was posted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date when the update was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_updates_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
